testcase.name: OpenSparrow – i18n: Bundle API GET /api.php?action=i18n_bundle returns 200
OpenSparrow – i18n: Bundle API bundle response is a non-empty JSON object
testcase.classname: bundle response is a non-empty JSON object

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – i18n: Bundle API bundle contains required common keys
OpenSparrow – i18n: Bundle API English bundle value for common.save is "Save"
testcase.classname: English bundle value for common.save is "Save"

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – i18n: Bundle API alternate language bundle differs from English when configured
testcase.classname: alternate language bundle differs from English when configured

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – i18n: ?lang= URL Switch page lang attribute matches en by default
testcase.classname: page lang attribute matches en by default

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – i18n: ?lang= URL Switch ?lang=pl sets <html lang="pl">
OpenSparrow – i18n: ?lang= URL Switch ?lang=de sets <html lang="de">
OpenSparrow – i18n: ?lang= URL Switch ?lang=en restores English
OpenSparrow – i18n: ?lang= URL Switch invalid ?lang= falls back gracefully (does not crash the page)
testcase.classname: invalid ?lang= falls back gracefully (does not crash the page)

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – i18n: Session Persistence language choice persists to the next page without ?lang= in URL
testcase.classname: language choice persists to the next page without ?lang= in URL

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – i18n: Session Persistence i18n bundle locale matches <html lang> on the page
testcase.classname: i18n bundle locale matches <html lang> on the page

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – i18n: JS Module window.I18n is available on the page
testcase.classname: window.I18n is available on the page

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – i18n: JS Module I18n.locale() returns a 2-letter language code
OpenSparrow – i18n: JS Module I18n.t() returns a translated string
testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected 'common.save' to not equal 'common.save' at captureUserInvocationStack (http://localhost:8080/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:139094:94) at Proxy.<anonymous> (http://localhost:8080/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:139122:9) at Proxy.assertEqual (http://localhost:8080/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:80801:12) at Proxy.methodWrapper (http://localhost:8080/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:78647:25) at Context.eval (webpack://opensparrow-e2e/./cypress/e2e/i18n.cy.js:223:47) at getRet (http://localhost:8080/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:119314:20) at Context.thenFn (http://localhost:8080/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:119325:66) at Context.then (http://localhost:8080/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:119576:21) at wrapped (http://localhost:8080/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:138092:19)

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – i18n: JS Module page load triggers exactly one i18n_bundle request
testcase.classname: page load triggers exactly one i18n_bundle request

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – i18n: Admin Settings Panel get_language_setting API returns current default and available languages
testcase.classname: get_language_setting API returns current default and available languages

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – i18n: Admin Settings Panel settings tab renders language configuration card
testcase.classname: settings tab renders language configuration card
